conditional.name: PROP-TAIL
conditional.statement: rho_prop@i<17(j) <= 1.02560749 persists for j > 60 (gate V13 covers j <= 60 on the operative window i < 17; measured monotone-decreasing 1.02559 at j=48 -> 1.01617 at j=60; the target equals the realized j=48 value up to +1.7e-5)
conditional.margins: operative-window margin at the worst gated level j=48 is +1.7e-5 (the target is the bisected realized value); the real safety is the measured monotone j-decay to 1.01617 at j=60. The i<10 window's ~1.008 is informational, NOT the census margin.
conditional.closed_proof_route: Edgeworth remainder of the coupled two-branch recurrence (share part: COMPUTED scalar cocycle contraction theta ~ 0.95-0.97; shape part: fiber collapse)
